[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10111110 6
1 01101111 6
2 10010010 3
3 01100011 4
4 00001000 1
5 11111011 7
6 10000000 1
7 10001001 3

12 00000000 a

34 00000000 a

67 01101101 5
70 10010000 2
